secrets.description: OM dapp's read-only on-chain address (recipient of every OM action). Default: canonical OM pubkey ut1zkj9p…l3mlms — leaving unset makes this deploy a behavioral duplicate of dapps.usernodelabs.org/opinion-market.
Address allowed to issue `create_survey` memos. Leave empty to let anyone create surveys.

Sender-side pubkey for the encryption-key publication wallet (publishes `publish_pubkeys` + `reveal_key` txs). Distinct from APP_PUBKEY because /wallet/send needs UTXOs at the sender. Canonical deploy reuses the lastwin pot keypair.
Secret half of SENDER_APP_PUBKEY. Used by /wallet/signer + /wallet/send to publish encryption keys on-chain. Never logged or returned via the API.

Hex or arbitrary string seed for deriving per-survey ECDH key pairs. MUST match every server using the same APP_PUBKEY, otherwise encrypted votes won't be decryptable. Default unset → falls back to dev-seed-do-not-use-in-production (matches the current canonical deploy).

Payout-pool wallet address. Holds REAL base-currency that backs automated market payouts; the payout bot sends winnings from here to each winner's wallet. Separate from APP_PUBKEY (recipient-only) and SENDER_APP_PUBKEY (key-publication gas). Leave unset to fall back to SENDER_APP_PUBKEY. Public address — non-private.

Secret half of POOL_APP_PUBKEY. Used by /wallet/signer + /wallet/send to transfer real payout funds to winners. Holds real funds — never logged or returned via the API. Leave unset to disable real payouts (the bot then only observes / seeds demo payouts in staging).
Virtual-credit → base-currency conversion rate for payouts (onchain_amount = floor(credits * rate)). Bounds real outflow since bets are zero-value memos. Default 0.01. Non-private config.
Floor the payout pool must not drop below. When the observed pool balance can't cover all owed payouts above this floor, the bot pays pro-rata. Default 0. Non-private config.

Set to "1" on exactly ONE deploy to make it the payout leader. Only the leader moves real funds; co-deployed servers sharing APP_PUBKEY stay observe-only to avoid double-spend. Default off. Non-private flag.
Sidecar usernode RPC endpoint. Defaults to the in-network node service.

API key for football-data.org, used to fetch World Cup 2026 match results and post resolve_wc26_match memos. Leave empty to disable automatic result resolution (matches will stay pending until a key is configured).
